title: Committee
$comment: Please note the following changes from V1.0.0 to V1.1.0:
- The YAML has been converted to JSON format to align with the standard JSON Schema format.

- The 'committeeName' property has been changed from a string to an array of objects to accommodate multiple local names in different languages. CommitteeNemaNL and CommitteeNameEN have been replaced with a more flexible structure that allows for any number of local names, each associated with a specific language code.
- The 'committeeMembers' property has been added to include a list of committee members, each conforming to the 'NenCommitteeMember_V1.1.0.json' schema.
- The properties are strongly typed with specific formats and constraints to ensure data integrity.
- The 'mutationType' property is deprecated and should be removed from the CDM.
- Renamed ...Date attributes into ...At to align with common naming conventions for timestamps.
Last modified on 2026-02-26 by Hans Bot - NEN

committeeId.$comment: In SAP 'projectnummer'. To be consistent, this property should be renamed into committeeUrn
committeeId.description: Unique identifier for the committee, typically in the format 'organization:committee:uniqueId'.

items.description: List of local names for the committee in different languages. Each entry includes the language code and the corresponding local name.

organization.$comment: Is this the same as the 'SDO' as defined in the Project CDM?

umbrellaStructure.description: possibly the committee in HAPI parlance

mainStructure.description: possibly the subcommittee in HAPI parlance

subStructure.description: possibly the working group in HAPI parlance

externalCommittee.description: Indicates whether the committee is external to NEN (true) or NEN internal (false).
externalCommittee.$comment: consider renaming into a more positive 'NenCommittee'

costCenter.comment: is this relevant outside the business administration domain? If so, we need to define the format and semantics of this property.

costCenterDescription.$comment: reads like a compound object with a number and a description

committeeType.description: possibly hapi:field, with the enumerated values TECHNICAL, POLICY, GOVERNANCE, EXTERNAL, NONTECHNICAL.

instituteType.description: possibly hapi:technicalSector, expressing expresses the business area the committee is active in

active.description: Please note that the indication 'active' is not always consistent with the terminatedAt value
active.$comment: possibly replace with a richer status attribute [inactive, active, terminated] or similar

createdAt.description: The date and time when the committee was created. Date must be in the past

terminatedAt.description: The date and time when the committee was decommissioned.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the committee was last updated.

responsiblePerson.description: The consultant responsible for the committee

employeeId.$comment: in SAP 'verantwoordelijke persoon', opgevoerd als 'secretaris' (responsible person)

firstName.description: The first name of the responsible person.

lastName.description: The last name of the responsible person.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the responsible person, used for communication purposes.

isoCalendarDate.$comment: probably best to create a separate definitions file
isoCalendarDate.description: A standard ISO calendar date in the European format (YYYY-MM-DD).

isoDateTimeExt.description: A date and time in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

sdo.description: Organisation involved in the creation of the standard text.

iddef.description: A unique identifier consisting of alphanumeric characters and hyphens.
